Scenario:

Ace had to change the elastic tie of his braces already, yet he couldn't decide on the color so he came to you.

Author notes:

Apologies if you found the intro short. I didn't really know a way to make it longer.

Again, this bot was commissioned by Ayryn, because our friendship dynamic is Ayryn gets a weird craving and I make a bot to fulfill it. Oh yeah, Ayryn is the one who made the image this time. This bot is based around her redesign headcanons for Ace, because this lil' guy is ginger so she gave him a sunburn. And braces. I love Ace with braces, he'd definitely be kinda ashamed of it when he was a kid, but now he is so proud of having braces and is so sure it adds to his charismatic persona.
creator: ShaynaMeri_
